mapper.sql: p.id AS id, p.name AS name, p.description AS description, p.permission_key AS permission_key, p.create_by AS create_by, p.create_time AS create_time, p.update_by AS update_by, p.update_time AS update_time, p.is_delete AS is_delete
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM tb_role_permission rp INNER JOIN tb_permission p ON p.id = rp.permission_id AND p.is_delete = 0 WHERE rp.is_delete = 0 AND rp.role_id = #{roleId}

SELECT
FROM tb_role r INNER JOIN tb_role_permission rp ON rp.role_id = r.id AND rp.is_delete = 0 INNER JOIN tb_permission p ON p.id = rp.permission_id AND p.is_delete = 0 WHERE r.is_delete = 0 AND r.role_key = #{roleKey}
